subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath favored man with the power of utterance and made him the dawning-place of understanding in the realm of creation. Exalted is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی فضل الانسان بالبیان و جعله مطلع التبیان فی الامکان تعالی
